message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Media Control and Media Use in the GDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13536","justification":"Survey on media control, censorship, and media use in the German Democratic Republic in 1988, directly covering media conditions and consumption in the late 1980s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes and Media Use in the GDR 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13535","justification":"Focuses on political attitudes and media use among citizens of the GDR in 1986, explicitly addressing media behavior and context in the 1980s."},{"title":"Mass Communication, Media Use and Everyday Life in the GDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13534","justification":"Study of mass communication and everyday media use in the GDR in 1985, providing empirical data on media consumption in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Public Opinion on Mass Media in the GDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13533","justification":"Examines public opinion on mass media within the GDR in 1984, directly focusing on media evaluation and trust during the 1980s."},{"title":"Information Behaviour and Media Use in the GDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13532","justification":"Investigates information behavior and media use in the GDR in 1983, covering how citizens accessed and used media during the early 1980s."},{"title":"Mass Media Reception and Political Socialization in the GDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13531","justification":"Deals with reception of mass media and its role in political socialization in the GDR in 1982, directly related to media’s political function in the 1980s."},{"title":"Television Use and Cross‑Border Media Reception in the GDR 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13530","justification":"Focuses on television use and reception of West German or foreign broadcasts in the GDR in 1981, highlighting media use and cross‑border information flows in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Press, Radio and Television in the GDR 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13529","justification":"Study on use of press, radio and television in the GDR in 1980, offering baseline data on media landscape and audience behavior at the start of the 1980s."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF Longitudinal Study: Media Use in East and West Germany 1985–1990 (GDR Subsample)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13540","justification":"Longitudinal data on media use in both German states; the GDR subsample allows focused analysis of media behavior in the GDR from mid‑1980s up to 1990."},{"title":"Youth and Media in the GDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13537","justification":"Concentrates on young people’s media use and attitudes in the GDR in 1987, providing age‑specific insight into media consumption during the late 1980s."}]}
